productDecision.decision: Treat FLOW-34 as an adapter-package aggregate until a canonical server engine flow directory is created.
basis: PER-FLOW-FIX-MAP-v2.9 marks FLOW-34 as code absent and calls for adapter implementation work.
The repo contains a broad server/test/marketplace-plugin-adapter adapter-package suite and marketplace plugin BFA rules.
productDecision.fullProtocolImpact: Three-tenant fork cascade and full mobility certification cannot be declared for the canonical flow source until server/src/engine/flows/marketplace-plugin-adapter exists.

initialFailure.command: Push-Location server; npx jest --runInBand --colors=false test/marketplace-plugin-adapter src/engine-contracts/__tests__/marketplace-plugin-adapter-bfa-rules.spec.ts; Pop-Location
initialFailure.result: 23 suites passed, 1 suite failed, 577 tests passed
initialFailure.rootCause: adapters/framer/FT-FR1 did not export the FLOW-34 component-library mapping contract required by the test suite.

fixApplied: Added Framer component/shared UI types to adapters/framer/FT-FR1/src/types.ts.
Added mapFramerToUIElement, mapFramerToUIStyle, mapUIStyleToFramer, readComponentTree, and writeComponentNames to adapters/framer/FT-FR1/src/framer-adapter.ts.

postFixVerification.command: Push-Location server; npx jest --runInBand --colors=false test/marketplace-plugin-adapter src/engine-contracts/__tests__/marketplace-plugin-adapter-bfa-rules.spec.ts; Pop-Location

sourceScan.interpretation: No canonical source directory exists to scan; adapter-package tests are the available executable surface.
